scripts.app:catalog: pnpm run scripts:build && pnpm run catalog:validate && pnpm run scripts:test
scripts.app:static: pnpm run storefront:static && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.app:gitops: kubectl kustomize gitops/apps/vintage >/tmp/hiraya-gitops-rendered.yaml && node .github/scripts/dist/assert-gitops-render.mjs --rendered /tmp/hiraya-gitops-rendered.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/clusters/dev/root >/tmp/hiraya-gitops-root.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/namespaces >/tmp/hiraya-platform-namespaces.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/gateway-api-crds >/tmp/hiraya-platform-gateway-api-crds.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/storage >/tmp/hiraya-platform-storage.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/external-secrets >/tmp/hiraya-platform-external-secrets.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/edge >/tmp/hiraya-platform-edge.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/argocd-access >/tmp/hiraya-platform-argocd-access.yaml && kubectl kustomize gitops/platform/monitoring >/tmp/hiraya-platform-monitoring.yaml && helm template aws-load-balancer-controller aws-load-balancer-controller --repo https://aws.github.io/eks-charts --version 3.4.0 --namespace kube-system -f gitops/platform/aws-load-balancer-controller/values-dev.yaml >/tmp/hiraya-aws-load-balancer-controller.yaml && helm template external-dns external-dns --repo https://kubernetes-sigs.github.io/external-dns/ --version 1.20.0 --namespace external-dns -f gitops/platform/external-dns/values-dev.yaml >/tmp/hiraya-external-dns.yaml && helm template external-secrets external-secrets --repo https://charts.external-secrets.io --version 0.10.7 --namespace external-secrets -f gitops/platform/external-secrets/values-dev.yaml >/tmp/hiraya-external-secrets.yaml && helm template kube-prometheus-stack kube-prometheus-stack --repo https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts --version 56.21.0 --namespace monitoring -f gitops/platform/monitoring/values-dev.yaml >/tmp/hiraya-kube-prometheus-stack.yaml
scripts.app:baseline: pnpm list --recursive --depth -1 && pnpm run app:catalog && pnpm run app:test:backend-contract && pnpm run app:test:frontend && pnpm run services:changed -- --all && pnpm run app:gitops && pnpm run app:static
scripts.app:test:catalog: pnpm run scripts:build && pnpm run scripts:test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.storefront:static: pnpm run storefront:build && pnpm run storefront:typecheck && pnpm run storefront:lint
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.docker:up:frontend-dev: docker compose -f app/microservices/docker-compose.yml --profile dev up frontend-dev
